title: Course: COSC 239 - Java Programming
description: Covers Java syntax, program structure, objects, classes, and object-oriented programming. Includes introductory data structures, annotations, self-documentation, software development principles, graphical user interfaces, and programming practice.
prerequisites_text: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
content:
COSC 239 - Java Programming
Credits: 3
Prerequisites: COSC 112 completed with a grade of C or higher
Offered: As needed

Description: Covers Java syntax, program structure, objects, classes, and object-oriented programming. Includes introductory data structures, annotations, self-documentation, software development principles, graphical user interfaces, and programming practice.

Curriculum role:
  - BS Computer Science: Group A
  - BS Cloud Computing: Group A

Catalog page: https://catalog.morgan.edu/preview_course_nopop.php?catoid=26&coid=55575
